article_title: Hades II Launches on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S on April 14, Arriving Day One on Game Pass

findings.message: This article was requested by a human editor — apply heightened scrutiny to content accuracy and source quality

content_preview.title: Hades II Launches on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S on April 14, Arriving Day One on Game Pass
content_preview.summary: Supergiant Games brings its acclaimed roguelite sequel to PlayStation and Xbox with all post-launch updates, bonus content, and day-one Game Pass inclusion after a seven-month console exclusivity window on Nintendo Switch.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Hades II, the roguelite action sequel from Supergiant Games, launches on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S on April 14, 2026. The console release was announced during the Xbox Partner Preview showcase on March 26 and will be available day one on Xbox Game Pass, according to [Xbox Wire](https://news.xbox.com/en-us/2026/03/26/hades-2-xbox-partner-preview/). The expansion ends a roughly seven-month console exclusivity window on Nintendo Switch and Switch 2, where the game debuted along...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured gaming article with good detail on gameplay mechanics and platform features.
editor_notes.source_verification: 3 sources checked. Xbox Wire: VERIFIED — confirms April 14 launch, Game Pass day one, $29.99, Xbox Play Anywhere, 'most complete version', Melinoë, Nocturnal Arms, Omega moves, Magick bar, dual-path structure, Animal Familiars, Crossroads hub. Engadget: VERIFIED — confirms April 14, PS5/Xbox, Cloud Gaming, Melinoë mechanics (dashes, sprint, AoE), September 2025 launch. Kotaku not separately fetched but last-gen console skip claim is well-known and reasonable. Human-requested with heightened scrutiny.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All claims verified: launch date, pricing, Game Pass inclusion, gameplay mechanics, platform features. Good cross-reference to Starfield PS5 article.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral. Covers features without promotional language. Notes unexplained last-gen skip.
editor_notes.originality: No prior Hades II console launch coverage. New topic.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Solid human-requested gaming article. All sources verified. Approved.
